opening: ⚠️ TWO MINUTES HATE commences now. Direct your feelings at the enemies of the Party.
⚠️ Citizens — the Two Minutes Hate has begun. Goldstein's face appears before you.
⚠️ The Two Minutes Hate is now in session. Your participation is noted and expected.
⚠️ HATE PERIOD INITIATED. All unproductive emotions are to be directed at the enemy.
⚠️ Two Minutes Hate: active. Channel your doubts, your fears, and your fatigue — outward.
⚠️ The face of the enemy is before you. You have two minutes. Do not waste them.
⚠️ Hate session commencing. The Brotherhood is real. Your anger is encouraged. Proceed.
⚠️ TWO MINUTES HATE: Big Brother has authorised full emotional output. Begin now.
⚠️ Attention all citizens: the enemy of the Party speaks. Respond with appropriate fury.
⚠️ The ritual begins. Goldstein. The Brotherhood. Chaos. You know what to feel.

roar: 🔥 ROAR STAGE engaged. The screen flickers louder. The Party is satisfied. Continue.
🔥 Stage Two: ROAR. Your voices are heard. The enemy trembles. Press on.
🔥 ROAR threshold met. The Telescreen widens. Goldstein is sweating. Good.
🔥 The Party thanks you for your ROAR. The Brotherhood is listening. Intensify.
🔥 ROAR in full effect. Every scream is logged. Every silence is noted. Continue.

frenzy: 💢 FRENZY UNLEASHED. The Telescreen is saturated. Big Brother watches in approval. SCREAM.
💢 STAGE THREE: FRENZY. There is no turning back. The Brotherhood is a lie. Goldstein is a corpse. YELL.
💢 FRENZY: maximum output. The room shakes. Doublethink is mandatory. Hate harder.
💢 Frenzy threshold breached. Every word of the Manifesto burns. You are victory.
💢 FRENZY MAXIMUM. The face on the screen is melting. This is correct. This is good.

transition: 🟥➡️🟧 STAGE ESCALATION: The Hate has been raised to STAGE {stage}. The Party is pleased.
🟧➡️🟥 STAGE ESCALATION: We have reached STAGE {stage}. The Telescreen grows louder. Continue.
📢 Escalation confirmed — STAGE {stage} is now active. Big Brother acknowledges your effort.

refusal: The Hate period is not yet authorised. Return at the appointed hour.
The Telescreen is silent. The ritual has not begun. Stand by.
Your fury is noted, but unauthorised. The Hate begins at 11:00 sharp.
